summary: Comprehensive testing of Skapeta Apartments Food Ordering System - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: Customer order flow, Admin login, Orders page, Settings page all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
API routes properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Order creation with WhatsApp notification integration working
Notification sound upload feature properly implemented in Settings

test_credentials.test_customer: Any first/last name for guest checkout

seed_data_creation: 3 menu items seeded (Margherita Pizza €12.50, Caesar Salad €8.50, Tiramisu €6.50)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features fully functional. Food ordering system complete with: 1) Customer can browse menu, add to cart, login/register, place orders with WhatsApp notification, 2) Admin can login, view orders, update status, manage settings including notification sound upload. Cart UI shows 'Your Cart' on LEFT and 'Create Order' button in CENTER as requested.

food_service_page.menu_loading: PASS - 3 menu items displayed with images, prices, categories
food_service_page.add_to_cart: PASS - Items added with toast notification
food_service_page.cart_ui: PASS - 'Your Cart' on LEFT, 'Create Order' in CENTER, cart preview on RIGHT
food_service_page.customer_login: PASS - Login modal with First/Last name, successful authentication
food_service_page.checkout_modal: PASS - Shows total, room number input, special instructions
food_service_page.place_order: PASS - Order created, WhatsApp notification triggered

admin_panel.dashboard: PASS - Shows monthly revenue, order stats, last orders
admin_panel.orders_page: PASS - Status filters, stats cards, Close Day button
admin_panel.settings_page: PASS - Notification sound upload section (🔔 Bildirim Sesi) with upload button

whatsapp_integration.details: Order placement triggers WhatsApp notification with order details (order number, customer name, items, total, room number)

ui_elements: Ses Dosyası Yükle (Upload Sound File) button
Sesi Test Et (Test Sound) button appears after upload
